snippet: Litecoin Foundation ⚡️ (@LTCFoundation): Flashback Friday: On March 27, 2023, Litecoin was deemed a commodity by the CFTC, the regulatory body for commodities. A significant and obvious decision, giving everyone the clear regulatory framework to build on. Being launched fairly, Litecoin has been a c
